title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Delhivery - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Delhivery - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhivery. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
